cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 2: Menendez is a terrorist.
Speaker 3: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 4: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 5: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
Speaker 5: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 6: Specter One, report.
Speaker 7: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 4: This isn't real. The hell it is.
Speaker 8: Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster!
Speaker 9: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 10: So eager to leave, that is. Killing men is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 11: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 12: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 13: Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.
Speaker 8: Control! Faster! Control! Faster! Control! Faster!

auditTrail.detail: Removed duplicated carryover line from chunk 1: 'Your streets shall once again run red...'
Removed duplicated carryover line from chunk 2: 'Menendez is a terrorist.'
Removed duplicated carryover line from chunk 6: Speaker 10 line beginning 'So eager to leave...'
Removed duplicated carryover promotional line from chunk 7: 'Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.'
Joined split sentence fragment 'run red. with your blood' into 'run red with your blood.'
Corrected obvious repetition artifact 'is is' to 'is' without changing meaning.
Standardized capitalization in call sign to 'Specter One'.

debug.notes: Cleaned transcript stitched from mechanical chunk output. Boundary duplicates were removed where the same line appeared at the end of one chunk and the start of the next. Repeated lines that recur later in the trailer were preserved if they occurred at new timestamps rather than as chunk overlap.
